message: Node started: Identify and define the three specific formal correspondences between Quantum Darwinism (QD) and Holographic Quantum Error Correction (HQEC). Focus on how the emergence of classicality through redundant information in QD relates to the encoding of bulk information in the boundary code of HQEC. Specifically, look for mappings involving: 1. Redundancy/Subsystem structure, 2. Information locality/entanglement wedge reconstruction, and 3. The role of the environment/boundary in protecting information.
